settings.title: Settings
settings.saveSuccess: ✅ Settings saved! Reload the page to apply changes.

coins.title: Tracked Coins
coins.tariffWarning: FREE tariff limit reached. Maximum {count} tokens.

interval.title: Update Interval
interval.label: How often to check prices (minutes)
interval.hint: Recommended: 5-15 minutes. Less = more frequent checks, but more API requests

drop.title: Drop Alert
drop.label: Price drop percentage
drop.hintEnabled: You will receive a notification if the price drops by this percentage or more

growth.title: Growth Alert
growth.label: Price growth percentage
growth.hintEnabled: You will receive a notification if the price grows by this percentage or more
